revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-145

Alternative term: Heart-shape reception

Reception in which the polar diagram of the magnitude of the received voltage plotted against the bearing is cardioid in form.

Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Cardioid reception}}
